items.headline: Messi ties the all-time World Cup goals record with a hat-trick
items.body: In Argentina's 3–0 win over Algeria in Kansas City, a 38-year-old Lionel Messi scored his first-ever World Cup hat-trick (17', 60', 76') to reach 16 career goals — level with Miroslav Klose's all-time record — in his record sixth World Cup. It's the signature moment of the tournament so far.
items.say: Messi got a hat-trick and tied the all-time World Cup goals record at 38 — the guy refuses to age.

items.headline: Canada makes history — 6–0 over Qatar — and the USMNT plays today
items.body: Canada crushed Qatar 6–0 in Vancouver for its first-ever men's World Cup win, powered by a Jonathan David hat-trick — the biggest World Cup win ever by a CONCACAF team. Today the tournament rolls on with USA–Australia (Pulisic reportedly out) and Brazil–Haiti.
items.say: Canada put SIX past Qatar — and the US is back on today. Wild that the co-hosts are this good.

items.headline: The US Open is brutal and windy at Shinnecock — Round 2 today
items.body: Golf's third major opened Thursday on Long Island with a fog delay and stiff winds turning Shinnecock into a survival test. Round 2 plays today with the cut looming — perfect Father's Day weekend viewing, with the usual debate over whether the USGA set it up too hard.
items.say: The US Open started — Shinnecock is eating these guys alive in the wind. Classic 'over par might win it' setup.

items.headline: CS2's Cologne Major is down to the playoffs — Grand Final Sunday
items.body: The IEM Cologne Major 2026 ($1.25M, the 'Cathedral of Counter-Strike') has reached single-elimination playoffs at the Lanxess Arena, with the best-of-five Grand Final set for Sunday, June 21. The Cologne crowd is the loudest atmosphere in Counter-Strike all year.
items.say: The CS Major in Cologne is down to the final few — that arena crowd is unreal if you've never seen it.

items.headline: NBA Draft is Tuesday — Washington holds the No. 1 pick
items.body: Fresh off the Knicks' title, attention turns to a draft class scouts are calling unusually deep. The Wizards won the lottery and pick first when the draft opens June 23 at Barclays Center; the run-up is full of trade rumors and mock-draft debates.
items.say: Wizards got the No. 1 pick — draft's Tuesday. Apparently this class is stacked, so it's worth watching who moves up.

items.headline: The 'Scary Movie' reboot wins the weekend; 'Masters of the Universe' lands
items.body: The relaunched Scary Movie topped the box office with a franchise-record opening north of $52M, while the live-action Masters of the Universe debuted to $31M+. A loaded summer slate has the multiplex busy again.
items.say: They rebooted Scary Movie and it actually won the box office — and Masters of the Universe is finally a real movie now.
